verse_text: If a thief is found breaking in at night and is killed, there shall be no guilt for his blood.

links.context: Zacchaeus uses the term give for his free and generous offering to the poor, and restore for what he owes those he had cheated, as this was not a gift but required by the Law ([[EXO.22:1]]). By doing both, Zacchaeus not only fulfills the Law, but shows his love of the gospel.
